minimal-valid.intent: Smallest sheeted workbook that passes full import+generation pipeline.

single-assay.intent: One assay with multiple analytes and one unit per analyte.

multi-assay.intent: Two assays to exercise per-assay processing grouping behavior.

multi-analyte.intent: Single assay with three analytes and heterogeneous units.

alias-driven-mapping.intent: Alias-style unit tokens exercise importer normalization and multi-unit splitting.

invalid-cross-file-mapping.intent: Analyte references a missing assay key and should fail domain linkage checks.

invalid-units.intent: Unit references a missing analyte key and should fail domain unit linkage checks.

malformed-workbook.intent: Non-zip payload with .xlsx extension should fail workbook loading.
